prompt:
[Use the uploaded face image as the PRIMARY identity reference]

High-end cinematic fashion poster of the SAME person walking in an urban architectural environment.

IDENTITY (HIGH PRIORITY):
Preserve facial identity from reference image.
Same face structure, beard, eyes, nose, lips.
Keep natural look (no distortion, no over-stylizing).
Face can be partially visible (side angle / downward look).

POSE & MOTION:
Full body walking pose.
Head slightly down, relaxed confident walk.
Create motion trail effect — multiple faded clones behind the subject showing walking movement.

STYLING:
Modern streetwear outfit:
Loose white shirt (similar to reference style),
Wide grey trousers,
Casual sneakers.
Natural fabric folds and realistic texture.

ENVIRONMENT:
Modern building exterior with textured walls.
Glass structure / metal beams.
Patterned wall panel on one side.
Urban luxury vibe.

LIGHTING:
Golden hour sunlight.
Warm tones, cinematic shadows.
Long shadows on ground.

CAMERA & COMPOSITION:
Low angle slightly behind perspective.
Full body shot.
Strong depth and perspective lines.

MOTION EFFECT (IMPORTANT):
3–4 ghosted silhouettes trailing behind the subject.
Transparent motion blur clones fading backward.

POSTER DESIGN:
Large bold typography at top: "MOTION"
Clean modern font.
Small subtitle text below:
"SPRING / SUMMER 2025"
Minimal branding text.

CINEMATIC LOOK:
High contrast,
Sharp details,
Slight film grain,
Professional fashion magazine quality.

REALISM:
Ultra realistic,
No AI artifacts,
Natural proportions.

--ar 9:16 --v 6 --style raw --q 2 --s 150 --iw 2
